extension_metadata.description: Extensions added by OntologyProposer from proposals_v020

FloatingPointStandard.description: A class representing standards and concepts related to floating point arithmetic in numerical methods.

NumericalConcept.description: A class representing fundamental concepts in numerical methods, including various types of numerical representations and their properties.

ErrorConcept.description: A class representing various types of errors encountered in numerical methods, including roundoff error and relative error.

MatrixConcept.description: A class representing various types and properties of matrices relevant to numerical methods, including concepts such as eigenvalue problems, singular value decomposition, and matrix classifications.

OrthogonalConcept.description: A class representing concepts related to orthogonality in mathematical structures, including orthogonal matrices and orthonormal vectors.

MatrixConditionConcept.description: A class representing properties related to the condition number of matrices, which is a crucial aspect in numerical analysis and stability of algorithms.

KrylovSubspaceConcept.description: A conceptual framework encompassing various mathematical methods and techniques related to Krylov subspaces used in numerical linear algebra.

MatrixOperationConcept.description: A class representing various operations and concepts related to matrix manipulations in numerical methods.

NormConcept.description: A class representing various types of norms used in numerical methods to measure the size or distance of mathematical objects.

MatrixPropertyConcept.description: A class representing properties and structures of matrices relevant to numerical methods, including symmetric positive definite matrices, orthogonal matrices, and related concepts.

CriticalPointConcept.description: A class representing the concept of critical points in mathematical analysis and numerical methods, encompassing various types and properties of critical points.

ConstraintConcept.description: A class representing various types of constraints used in numerical methods, including equality and inequality constraints, as well as related concepts like constraint qualification and active constraints.

SolutionProperty.description: This class encompasses properties related to the existence and uniqueness of solutions in numerical methods.

DerivativeConcept.description: A class representing various types of derivatives and their approximations used in numerical methods.
